name: Ceil and Floor in Sorted Array
description: Given a sorted array and a target value x, find the floor and ceiling of x. Floor is the largest element <= x. Ceiling is the smallest element >= x. If floor or ceiling doesn't exist, return -1.
constraints: 1 <= arr.length <= 10^5. 1 <= arr[i] <= 10^6. Array is sorted in non-decreasing order.
